api_chat_home_card_desc: Connect to LLMs directly via API keys
api_chat_empty_state: Connect to your favorite LLM provider using API keys.
api_chat_no_provider: Configure a provider in Settings → API Chat
api_chat_settings_desc: Manage your API providers and connection settings
api_chat_memory_desc: Information about yourself that the AI will remember across conversations. Not shown in chat.
api_chat_memory_placeholder: e.g. I'm a medical student studying cardiology...
api_chat_character_desc: Define the AI's personality and tone. Not shown in chat.
api_chat_character_placeholder: e.g. You are a knowledgeable and patient tutor...
api_chat_system_prompt_desc: General system instructions. Not shown in chat.
api_chat_system_prompt_placeholder: e.g. You are a helpful assistant...
api_chat_no_providers: No providers configured. Add one above.
api_chat_no_fetched_models: No models fetched. Fetch in Settings.
api_chat_enter_hint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line
api_chat_drop_image_hint: Drop the image anywhere to add it to this chat.
api_chat_confirm_clear_messages: Are you sure you want to clear all messages in this chat? The chat history won't be deleted, it will remain as an empty chat.
api_chat_modal_subtitle: Manage and search all your past chats
api_chat_confirm_clear_all: All your chat history will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?
api_chat_modal_search_placeholder: Search in titles or message contents...
api_chat_confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this chat?
api_chat_no_search_results: No chats matched your search criteria.
api_chat_no_history_yet: You don't have any chat history yet.
api_chat_sugg_2_desc: Find the memory leak in this JavaScript code...
api_chat_sugg_3_desc: Rewrite the paragraph in an academic tone...
api_chat_sugg_4_desc: Write a fun intro text for Quizlab...
api_chat_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this chat?
